Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I see. Well, if you gained confidence, that's the best thing you could have achieved.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}You completed your task, and that's something to be proud of.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It must've hit you all at once.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Don't worry, you'll get used to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Wow... I never knew I had that kinda power![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}'Cause you were bouncing around like a little kid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You say that, but you look pretty tired yourself, Yuka-tan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}This is different... It's like I'm having trouble breathing. What's going on?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}That's the effect of the Dark Hour. You'll become fatigued more easily.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Don't worry. You'll get used to it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I have to say, though... I'm surprised. You all did much better than I expected.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}At this rate, they'll catch up to you in no time, Akihiko.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By combining my powers with the team's,[n]I was able to stand against the Shadows...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sense a strong bond with them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Just like Yukari and Junpei,[n]I feel tired as well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided that it would be best[n]to return to my room and rest...[n]{f 1 1}
